creator: admin@support.od.ua
text:
When building from ports, p5-Locale-libintl requires a full specific and larger version of perl5.


root@netbox-test:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Locale-libintl # make
===>   p5-Locale-libintl-1.33 depends on package: gettext-runtime>=0.22_1 - found
===>   p5-Locale-libintl-1.33 depends on executable: msgfmt - found
===>   p5-Locale-libintl-1.33 depends on package: perl5>=5.36<5.37 - found
===>   p5-Locale-libintl-1.33 depends on shared library: libiconv.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libiconv.so)
===>   p5-Locale-libintl-1.33 depends on shared library: libintl.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libintl.so)
===>  Configuring for p5-Locale-libintl-1.33
env: /usr/local/bin/perl5.36.3: No such file or directory
*** Error code 127

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/p5-Locale-libintl
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/p5-Locale-libintl


# uname -a
FreeBSD netbox-test.XXXXXXX 13.2-STABLE FreeBSD 13.2-STABLE 74614fa93 SUPPORT-13-2-0 amd64

# pkg info perl5
perl5-5.36.2_1

Version        : 5.36.2_1
Installed on   : Tue Dec  5 12:46:56 2023 EET
Origin         : lang/perl5.36
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : perl5 lang devel
...

# env
TMUX_PANE=%1
TMUX=/tmp/tmux-0/default,12199,0
TERM_PROGRAM_VERSION=3.3a

TERM=tmux-256color

LOGNAME=root
USER=root
PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/root/bin
HOME=/root
LANG=ru_RU.UTF-8
SHELL=/bin/csh
SHLVL=1
BLOCKSIZE=K
EDITOR=vi
OSTYPE=FreeBSD
VENDOR=amd
HOST=netbox-test.XXXXXXXX
MM_CHARSET=UTF-8
_=/usr/bin/env
SSH_CONNECTION=10.255.202.252 49917 10.255.202.234 22
PWD=/usr/ports/devel/p5-Locale-libintl
MAIL=/var/mail/root
MACHTYPE=x86_64
PAGER=less
